name: circuit-next
description: Claude Code plugin that runs configurable developer workflows. Phase 2 wired state: `/circuit:run` classifies free-form tasks into the current router-supported workflows (`explore` or `review`) and invokes the selected workflow through the project CLI; `/circuit:explore` and `/circuit:review` remain explicit workflow commands. Future phases add `build`, `repair`, `migrate`, `sweep`, and user-authored custom workflows with per-step model + reasoning-effort + skills configuration.

commands.name: circuit:run
commands.description: Classifies free-form tasks into the current router-supported workflows (`explore` or `review`) and runs the selected workflow through the project CLI.

commands.name: circuit:explore
commands.description: Investigate, understand, choose among options, or shape an execution plan. Runs the full-spine explore workflow end-to-end via the project CLI, producing a canonical event log + result artifact under the run root.

commands.name: circuit:review
commands.description: Audit a scoped change or artifact with the review workflow. Runs the audit-only review fixture via the project CLI and surfaces the run root, event log, and typed review result artifact on completed runs.
